title: /ask can't answer questions about smackerel itself (grounding gap)
blockedReason: Blocked on a product/design decision, not on implementation. Live evidence (home-lab deploy host, 2026-07-23) proves the open_knowledge agent has NO grounded source for a question about this private product: web_search (searxng, ENABLE_SEARXNG=true) returns Super Mario Wiki results for the token 'smackerel' (the public web has zero knowledge of the product); internal_retrieval is empty because the user's knowledge graph has never ingested smackerel's own docs; and the local LLM (gemma4:26b/qwen3:30b-a3b) has no training data on a private product. The refusal is therefore CORRECT (BUG-061-009 made it honest). Making /ask ANSWER meta-questions requires the operator/owner to choose the fix direction: (A) ingest smackerel's own docs as a citeable source (recommended, ideally a dedicated system-knowledge collection separate from the personal graph), (B) a dedicated about_smackerel help tool in the agent tool_allowlist, or (C) accept the limitation and keep the honest refusal. Owner next-step: pick A / B / C; then this bug can be specced and implemented.
discoveredBy: operator (live /ask on the home-lab bot; diagnosed during BUG-061-009 close-out)
dependsOn: specs/061-conversational-assistant/bugs/BUG-061-009-high-band-refusal-masked-as-saved-as-idea (done — made this case refuse honestly instead of masking as 'saved as an idea')

diagnosis.summary: Grounding/data gap, not a code defect. Neither web_search (public web doesn't know the private product — searxng returns Super Mario Wiki for 'smackerel') nor internal_retrieval (product's own docs never ingested) nor the local LLM (no training data on a private product) can ground an answer about smackerel itself. The cite-back verifier + provenance gate correctly refuse the uncited synthesis.
liveEvidence: open_knowledge wired: provider=searxng model=gemma4:26b synthesis_model=qwen3:30b-a3b tool_count=4 (core startup log)

direct searxng query 'smackerel second brain' -> top result 'Smackerel - Super Mario Wiki ... enemies that appear in Super Mario Bros. Wonder ... resemble flatfish' (public web has no knowledge of the product)

certification.achievedAssuranceLevel: diagnosed (evidence-backed); awaiting product decision on fix direction
gatesPassed: root-cause diagnosis with live home-lab evidence
pendingGates: owner decision: fix option A (self-knowledge ingestion), B (about_smackerel help tool), or C (accept honest-refusal limitation)
spec + design + scopes (deferred until fix direction is chosen — scaffolding them now would be premature/fabricated)

nextRequiredOwner: operator/owner (choose fix direction A/B/C; then bubbles.plan specs it)
